summary: Native AndroidX-specific ReactiveUI support for projects that intentionally target native Android rather than MAUI.
recommendedPatterns: Prefer this only when native AndroidX is truly required.
avoidPatterns: Do not choose AndroidX by default when MAUI is the desired cross-platform path.
Do not ignore activity lifecycle in subscriptions.
setupSteps: Use reactive activity or fragment base types.
commonPitfalls: Accidentally applying MAUI guidance to native AndroidX projects.

harvest.sourceSummary: Curated from local ReactiveUI repositories, official GitHub documentation, and current SDK/package guidance.
harvest.notes: Prepared for the ReactiveUI MCP Server knowledge catalog.
